response.overview: The film revolves around the character Jiga, dubbed "Seva Bhavi" (meaning a selfless helper or server), who is always ready to serve the community. The story focuses on his humorous interactions and, as suggested by character teasers, his "social service" activities that create a "full-on entertainment" experience. The plot involves engaging character work and comedic situations, including characters like "Dalsukh," designed to make it a family-oriented watch.
response.title: Seva Bhavi
